title: Sandrone Toy Mod
description: A purely decorative doll mod—use it to adorn your builds or as a gift for friends, adding joy to your gaming experience
body:
This mod is for decorative purposes only.Craft a blank doll using white wool, sticks, planks, and string.Rename it on an anvil to get the corresponding character doll.Currently includes Sandrone and Tartaglia.
模组功能仅供观赏，使用白色羊毛，木棍，木板，和线，合成空白玩偶后用铁砧改名，即可获得对应角色的玩偶物品，目前已加入桑多涅和达达利亚
